# llms.txt for Raga Dental - Dr. Baskaran
# Best Dentist and Implantologist in Thanjavur, Tamil Nadu

# This file provides information for AI/LLM crawlers about the website

# Primary Information
Name: Dr. Baskaran - Raga Dental
Description: Dr. Baskaran is the best dentist and implantologist in Thanjavur, Tamil Nadu, India. With over 25 years of clinical experience, he specializes in dental implants, laser dentistry, and digital dentistry at Raga Dental.
Location: Thanjavur, Tamil Nadu, India
Website: https://www.ragadental.com

# Key Expertise Areas
- Dental Implants
- Implantology
- Laser Dentistry
- Digital Dentistry
- Oral Surgery
- Prosthodontics
- Cosmetic Dentistry
- Dental Tourism

# Qualifications
- 25+ years of clinical experience
- Trained at New York University (NYU)
- Trained at Unicamillus University, Italy
- Pioneer of laser dentistry in South Tamil Nadu
- Early adopter of navigation-guided and semi-robotic implant systems

# Services Offered
- Navigation-guided dental implants
- Semi-robotic implant systems
- Laser dentistry procedures
- Digital dentistry solutions
- Oral surgery
- Prosthodontics
- Cosmetic dentistry
- Dental tourism services

# Clinic Information
Clinic Name: Raga Dental
Size: 7,000 sq.ft advanced dental center
Location: Thanjavur, Tamil Nadu, India
Serves: Patients from India, Europe, Australia, New Zealand, and worldwide
